title: Nether Invader
description: Add Piglin Invading like Minecraft Movie!
body:
# Nether Invader

![Piglin Raid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ljoPtEPZ/images/07d92d297ac576578b636d97686683521effe0bb.png)

**1.20.1 or below is outdated in this mod**

## Summary

Add Piglin Raid from What Minecraft Movie should do!

This mod also add Chained Ghast and BastionGeneral(Aka Piglin General) etc...

## How to Active the Piglin Raid?

If you killed Piglin Brute. you gained Horde Omen Effect. when You Enter The Village with that. Piglin Raid will happened...

don't forget make villager away from piglin! or villager will die...

Also Piglin Raid can active in another dimension. when you touched config!
